title: The Conquest of al-Mada'in before the Founding of alKufah
description: al-Ku f ah According to al-Sari-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Muhammad, Talhah, alMuhallab, 'Amr and Said: The conquests of al-Mada'in comprised the Sawid, Hulwan, Masabadhan and Qargisiya'. The frontier ways of access of al-Kufah were the following four: Hulwan under the command of al-Qa'ga' b. 'Amr, Masabadhin under the command of llirar b. al-Khattab al-Fihri, Qargisiya' under the com281.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
